sentences.arabic: وَلِدَ لِعَائِلَةِ مُحَمَّدٍ طِفْلٌ جَدِيدٌ اسْمُهُ زَيْدٌ.
sentences.translation: Muhammedovoj porodici rodilo se novo dijete po imenu Zejd.
sentences.translationEn: A new baby named Zayd was born to Muhammad's family.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحَ الإِخْوَةُ الْكِبَارُ كَثِيرًا بِقُدُومِ زَيْدٍ.
sentences.translation: Starija braća su se jako obradovala Zejdovom dolasku.
sentences.translationEn: The older siblings were very happy about Zayd's arrival.

sentences.arabic: كَانُوا يُغَنُّونَ لَهُ وَيُلَاعِبُونَهُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Pjevali su mu i zabavljali ga svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: They used to sing to him and play with him every day.

sentences.arabic: نَامَ زَيْدٌ بِسُرْعَةٍ كُلَّمَا سَمِعَ أَصْوَاتَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Zejd je brzo zaspio svaki put kad bi čuo njihove glasove.
sentences.translationEn: Zayd fell asleep quickly whenever he heard their voices.
